profiles:
Dataset: EIA Brent Monthly (May 1987-present)
  Shape: 467 rows x 2 cols
  Columns:
    brent_usd_bbl                            Float64      nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=9.82, max=132.72, mean=51.01
    date                                     Date         nulls=0 (0.0%)  range 1987-05-01 to 2026-03-01

Dataset: EIA Brent Daily (1986-2026)
  Shape: 9862 rows x 2 cols
  Columns:
    brent_daily_usd_bbl                      Float64      nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=9.10, max=143.95, mean=50.94
    date                                     Date         nulls=0 (0.0%)  range 1987-05-20 to 2026-03-30

Dataset: OWID Crude Oil Real Price (1861-2024)
  Shape: 49 rows x 2 cols
  Columns:
    year                                     Int64        nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=1976.00, max=2024.00, mean=2000.00
    oil_price_usd_bbl                        Float64      nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=79.98, max=702.38, mean=280.17

Dataset: IEA/IRENA Clean & Renewable Investment (2015-2024)
  Shape: 10 rows x 5 cols
  Columns:
    year                                     Int64        nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=2015.00, max=2024.00, mean=2019.50
    clean_energy_invest_bn_usd               Int64        nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=590.00, max=2100.00, mean=990.00
    fossil_fuel_invest_bn_usd                Int64        nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=650.00, max=1050.00, mean=849.00
    renewable_power_invest_bn_usd            Int64        nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=286.00, max=807.00, mean=413.90
    clean_fossil_ratio                       Float64      nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=0.76, max=2.00, mean=1.13

Dataset: IEA GEC / NGFS Scenario Brent Paths (2020-2030)
  Shape: 11 rows x 6 cols
  Columns:
    year                                     Int64        nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=2020.00, max=2030.00, mean=2025.00
    brent_STEPS_usd_bbl                      Int64        nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=42.00, max=100.00, mean=71.91
    brent_APS_usd_bbl                        Int64        nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=42.00, max=100.00, mean=67.91
    brent_NZE_usd_bbl                        Int64        nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=42.00, max=100.00, mean=63.09
    brent_HIGH_SHOCK_usd_bbl                 Int64        nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=42.00, max=130.00, mean=94.45
    brent_LOW_SHOCK_usd_bbl                  Int64        nulls=0 (0.0%)  min=25.00, max=100.00, mean=57.64
